creator: arved@arved.at
text:
On launch of sa-spamd i got the following errormessage:

[48326] error: Can't locate Mail/DomainKeys/Message.pm in @INC (@INC contains: lib /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8 /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.7 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.6 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.5 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Mail/SpamAssassin/Plugin/DomainKeys.pm line 83.

Fix: 

Add a dependency on p5-Mail-DomainKeys
How-To-Repeat: 	Install spamassassin on a clean machine
